# Java Agents

## Java Agents 2026

- [About Java Agent](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/about.md): Overview of PingAM Java Agent architecture: agent components, configuration modes, session handling, and the request processing flow.
- [About Java Agents and PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/identity-cloud-guide/about.md): How PingAM Java Agents integrate with PingOne Advanced Identity Cloud to enforce resource-based policies across web applications and APIs.
- [Access](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/security-guide/access.md): Reduce the attack surface of PingAM Java Agent deployments by removing non-essential access, managing agent sessions, and securing cookies.
- [Access Denied URI Map](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.access.denied.uri.map.md)
- [Agent Debug Level](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.debug.level.md)
- [Agent Filter Mode Map](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.filter.mode.map.md)
- [Agent Profile Name](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.profile.name.md)
- [Agent Profile Realm](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.agent.profile.realm.md)
- [agentadmin command](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/installation-guide/agentadmin.md): Reference for the agentadmin command-line tool to install, uninstall, list, encrypt, and manage PingAM Java Agent instances.
- [Alternative Agent Host Name](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.agent.hostname.md)
- [Alternative Agent Port Number](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.agent.port.md)
- [Alternative Agent Protocol](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.agent.protocol.md)
- [Always invalidate sessions](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.config.logout.session.invalidate.enabled.md)
- [AM Authentication Service Host Name](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.am.hostname.md)
- [AM Authentication Service Path](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.am.path.md)
- [AM Authentication Service Port](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.am.port.md)
- [AM Authentication Service Protocol](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.am.protocol.md)
- [AM Login URL List](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/com.sun.identity.agents.config.login.url.md)
- [Attribute fetch modes](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/passing-attributes.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent to fetch and inject user profile, session, and policy response attributes into HTTP headers, cookies, or request objects.
- [Audit Access Types](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.audit.what.md)
- [Audit Log Directory](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.local.audit.dir.path.md)
- [Audit Log Exclude Paths](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.audit.exclude.path.list.md)
- [Audit Log Filename (deprecated)](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.local.audit.file.path.md)
- [Audit Log Include Paths](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.audit.include.path.list.md)
- [Audit Log Location](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.audit.where.md)
- [Audit Logfile Retention Count](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.local.audit.log.retention.count.md)
- [Audit the deployment](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/maintenance-guide/auditing.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent auditing using the Commons Audit Framework, with remote, local, or combined audit event logging and field filtering.
- [Audits and logs](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/security-guide/audit-log.md): Secure PingAM Java Agent audit trails and log files: propagate transaction IDs, restrict log access, and minimize sensitive data in logs.
- [Authentication Exchange Cookie Name](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.authn.exchange.cookie.name.md)
- [Authentication Exchange URI](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.authn.exchange.uri.md)

- [Authentication failure](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/authentication-failure.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent authentication failure handling: failure URLs, reason codes, notifications, and limiting failed login attempts.
- [Authentication Redirect URI](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.authn.redirect.uri.md)
- [Autonomous mode](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/autonomous.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent autonomous mode to operate without contacting PingAM, granting access only through not-enforced rules.
- [Autonomous mode](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.fallback.mode.enabled.md)
- [Bad advice loop termination counter](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.bad.advice.loop.termination.counter.md)
- [Bad advice loop termination HTTP status](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.bad.advice.loop.termination.http.code.md)
- [Bad advice loop termination URL](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.bad.advice.loop.termination.url.md)
- [Caches](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/caching.md): Understand PingAM Java Agent caching: configuration, session, policy decision, not-enforced rules, POST data preservation, and JWT caches.
- [Client Hostname Header](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.http.header.containing.remote.hostname.md)

- [Configuration Reload Interval](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.config.reload.seconds.md)
- [Configure an Apache HTTP Server as a reverse proxy](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/configure-apache-server.md): Configure Apache HTTP Server as a reverse proxy between PingAM and PingAM Java Agent, enabling WebSocket support for agent notifications.
- [Configure load balancers and reverse proxies](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/load-balancers-proxies.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent for environments with load balancers and reverse proxies: client identification, TLS offloading, and FQDN mapping.
- [Container Character Encoding](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.container.encoding.md)
- [Container Parameter Encoding](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.container.param.encoding.md)
- [Continuous security](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/user-guide/continuous-security.md): Configure PingAM Java Agent continuous security to pass request IP, DNS name, and custom cookies or headers to PingAM policy decisions.
- [Continuous Security Cookie Map](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.continuous.security.cookies.map.md)

- [Cookie Reset](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2026/properties-reference/org.forgerock.agents.cookie.reset.enabled.md)

- [Untitled](https://docs.pingidentity.com/java-agents/2023.11/upgrade/upgrade.md)
